brand.name: String — Brand name as it should appear on screen
brand.tagline: String — Brand or campaign tagline, if any

product.name: String — Product name as it should appear on screen
product.usp: String — The ONE thing this ad communicates
images: URL — High-res product images (lifestyle or packshot)

creative_direction.theme: String — Creative theme (e.g., 'High-energy fitness lifestyle', 'Minimal luxury unboxing', 'Raw UGC testimonial')

the_hook.type: Enum [visual_surprise, bold_claim, question, product_in_action, pattern_interrupt, relatable_moment, sound_hook, text_hook] — Hook mechanic
the_hook.visual: String — What the viewer SEES in seconds 0.0 to 1.5 (e.g., 'Extreme close-up of serum dropping onto skin in slow-mo', 'Product smashing through a stack of competitor boxes')
the_hook.audio: String — What the viewer HEARS in seconds 0.0 to 1.5 (e.g., 'Satisfying pop sound', 'Record scratch', 'Whispered question', 'Silence then bass drop')

characters.talent_type: Enum [real_actor, ai_avatar, animated_character, ugc_style_creator, hand_model, no_talent]

scenes.visual_description: String — What is visually happening. Be specific about composition, lighting, setting, product placement
scenes.camerashot_type: Enum [extreme_close_up, close_up, medium_close_up, medium, medium_wide, wide, overhead, pov, dutch_angle]
